name: Natural Promenade Turn
preceding_figure_names: Basic Reverse Turn, Chase, Contra Check, Fallaway Four Step, Fallaway Promenade, Five Step, Four Step, Natural Promenade Turn, Natural Twist Turn, Open Finish, Open Promenade, Open Reverse Turn, Lady In Line, Open Reverse Turn, Lady Outside, Oversway, Progressive Link, Progressive Side Step Reverse Turn
following_figure_names: Closed Promenade, Open Promenade, Natural Promenade Turn, Promenade Link, Back Open Promenade, Fallaway Promenade, Rock Turn (2-7)
notes:
Amount of Turn: 3/4 to right.
If the Promenade Turn is danced along the side of the room 3/4 is still made. The following Promenade would be taken to the center, or a slight body turn to R may be used as the LF is place to side of RF to enable the following Promenade to be taken DC.
When this Natural Promenade Turn is followed by steps 2-7 Rock Turn, skip step 4 (placing RF to side), it is more flat and rotational (compared to Twist Turn).
Natural Promenade Turn follows the Fallaway Promenade.

steps.action: LF to side in PP | Along LOD, pointing DW
comments: Don't pull lady to your lady, instead Man should switch lane.

steps.action: RF forward in PP and CBMP | DW | H | turning R | CBM
LF to side and slightly back | Backing LOD | BHB | turning R
RF fwd in CBMP, LF placed to side without weight in PP | DW of new LOD. End facing DW | H then IE of B of LF | total of 3/4 to R | CBM
RF to side in PP | Along LOD, pointing DC | H
LF forward and across in PP and CBMP | Pointing down LOD | H
RF fwd between partner's feet | Down LOD | H | CBM
LF to side and slightly back. RF placed to side without weight in PP | End facing DC of new LOD. | BH then IE of B of RF | 3/4 to R
